business_problem: Levi Strauss & Co.'s push to become a fan-obsessed, direct-to-consumer brand created an influx of data that overwhelmed inconsistent end-user devices—employees experienced crashes when handling 20,000-line reporting files—and varied processes for joining meetings and accessing applications slowed productivity across the workforce.
solution_summary: Levi Strauss & Co. deployed Copilot+ PCs with Windows 11, Microsoft Intune for endpoint management, and Microsoft 365 Copilot to modernize employee experiences and accelerate AI-driven business transformation. The system ingests massive datasets from direct-to-consumer operations and Standard Operating Procedure documentation, enabling Copilot agents to process and analyze information at unprecedented scale. Microsoft 365 Copilot on Windows 11 provides AI capabilities directly in employee workflows, while agents built on Copilot+ PCs accelerate project timelines from a year to a day. Microsoft Intune ensures consistent device deployment and management across global locations with unified security and compliance controls. The solution enables employees to build custom agents rapidly through a low-complexity interface, creating reusable automation across finance, HR, and operations.
business_outcome: Levi Strauss & Co. delivers a consistent, AI-enabled employee experience across the workforce, eliminated reporting crashes for finance teams, and uses Copilot agents to compress year-long projects to a single day while moving from agent concept to executive demo in three weeks.
metrics: Project review time reduced from up to one year to one day
Agent concept to executive demo in three weeks
Monthly reporting task involves about 20,000 lines of data
architecture_clues: Microsoft Intune as universal endpoint management foundation
Surface Copilot+ PCs with dedicated Copilot key
Microsoft 365 Copilot embedded in everyday tools and Windows
Custom Copilot agents ('Ask Ben') for HR/benefits navigation
SOP audit agent built on Copilot
Rivet: Teams-fronted conversational super-agent orchestrating multiple Copilot agents
evidence_quotes: With Copilot, we had results in a day. ... Stirling estimates that reviewing them would take up to a year, and 'a painful one,' at that.
With Copilot on Windows, building an agent was so simple that my team went from concept to presenting a demo to the executive team in three weeks.
One of the first steps in our journey was to deploy Microsoft Intune across all endpoints in the company.
A Copilot+ PC running on Windows 11, it really just makes folks’ lives easy and helps us provide an amazing employee experience.

solution_components.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot
solution_components.role: Delivers AI capabilities directly integrated into employee productivity workflows for rapid data analysis and document processing.

solution_components.name: Windows 11
solution_components.role: Operating system optimized for AI workloads with integrated Copilot support and native acceleration for sophisticated computations.

solution_components.name: Surface Copilot+ PC
solution_components.role: Hardware platform with local AI acceleration enabling sophisticated workload processing like large dataset summarization without crashing.

solution_components.name: Microsoft Intune
solution_components.role: Manages consistent device deployment, security, and compliance controls across global locations for all endpoints.

solution_components.name: Microsoft Teams
solution_components.role: Provides unified portal for employee access to Copilot agents and multi-agent orchestration through the Rivet framework.

solution_components.name: Copilot agents
solution_components.role: Custom AI agents built by employees for specific business functions like HR benefits navigation and operational procedure analysis.

data_flow: Employee workloads and datasets flow through Copilot-enabled Windows 11 systems. When employees interact with Microsoft 365 Copilot, it processes queries against internal data sources such as audit documents, operational procedures, and benefit information, returning analyzed results and insights. Copilot agents built on the Copilot platform aggregate data from multiple business systems, automatically generating reports and classifications. Microsoft Intune ensures consistent data management and security across all devices. Future integration will route queries through the Rivet multi-agent orchestrator in Microsoft Teams.
integration_points: Direct-to-consumer operational data and customer systems
Internal policy and procedure documentation repositories
Microsoft Intune for device management and compliance
